name: Kharkiv Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the crimson field of the flag

description: A crimson (red) field charged at the centre with the coat of arms of Kharkiv Oblast.
history: Adopted by the VI session of the XXIII convocation of the Kharkiv Oblast Council on 11 May 1999. Kharkiv historically was the capital of the Sloboda Ukraine cossack lands.

features.role: arms of Kharkiv Oblast — cornucopia and caduceus
features.symbolism: trade, agriculture and prosperity in the Sloboda Ukraine
